title: Artisan Sourdough Loaf
description: Rye sourdough with a crispy crust and tender, slightly tangy crumb. 24-hour fermentation.

title: Multigrain Boule
description: Rustic round loaf with flaxseed, sunflower seeds, and sesame. Rich in fiber.

title: Brioche Loaf
description: Rich, buttery loaf made with eggs and high-quality butter. Perfect for toast or French sandwiches.

title: Classic Carrot Cake
description: Moist carrot sponge with walnuts, layered with cream cheese frosting. Topped with candied nuts.

title: New York Cheesecake
description: Dense, creamy cheesecake on a buttery graham cracker crust. Served with berry compote.

title: Red Velvet Slice
description: Velvety red cake paired with smooth cream cheese frosting. An American classic.

title: Chocolate Fudge Brownie
description: Rich, dense brownie with a chocolate filling and crackly top. For true chocoholics.

title: Lemon Drizzle Loaf — $4.20
description: Tender lemon cake soaked in a tangy syrup. Refreshing and bright.

title: Blueberry Muffin Top
description: Fluffy muffin loaded with fresh blueberries and topped with a crunchy streusel.

title: Tiramisu
description: Classic Italian dessert. Layers of espresso-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone cream.

title: Pistachio & Raspberry Tartlet
description: Buttery tart shell filled with pistachio cream and topped with fresh raspberries.

title: Double Chocolate Muffin
description: Chocolate muffin studded with chunks of dark chocolate.

title: Honey Cake
description: Layered honey cake with thin, delicate layers and sour cream frosting. Soft and aromatic.

title: Coconut & Lime Slice
description: Exotic coconut bar with lime zest, topped with a white chocolate glaze.

title: Apple Crumble Pie
description: Pie with caramelized apples and a buttery crumb topping. Served warm.

title: Espresso
description: A pure, intense shot of 100% Arabica. Balanced acidity and rich crema.

title: Americano
description: Espresso diluted with hot water. Bold and smooth.

title: Flat White
description: Double espresso with velvety microfoam. Rich coffee flavor with creamy texture.

title: Latte
description: A smooth blend of espresso and steamed milk topped with a thin layer of foam.

title: Cappuccino
description: Balanced espresso with a thick, dense milk foam. Dusted with cocoa.

title: Caffè Mocha
description: Espresso combined with Belgian chocolate, steamed milk, and topped with whipped cream.

title: Hot Chocolate
description: Rich hot chocolate made with natural cocoa and creamy milk. Topped with mini marshmallows.

title: Classic Butter Croissant
description: Flaky, layered croissant made with high-quality butter. Crisp outside, tender inside.

title: Almond Croissant
description: Butter croissant filled with almond cream, topped with sliced almonds and powdered sugar.

title: Ham & Cheese Croissant
description: Flaky croissant filled with Parma ham and melted Gruyère cheese. Baked to golden perfection.

title: Chocolate Chip Muffin
description: Classic muffin loaded with semi-sweet chocolate chips. Soft and moist.

title: Banana & Walnut Muffin
description: Muffin made with ripe bananas and crunchy walnuts. Naturally sweet.

title: Raspberry & White Chocolate Muffin
description: Vanilla muffin with tart raspberries and sweet white chocolate chunks.

title: Savory Spinach & Feta Muffin
description: Hearty savory muffin with spinach, feta cheese, and sun-dried tomatoes. Sugar-free.

title: Fruit Tart
description: Buttery tart shell filled with vanilla pastry cream, topped with fresh seasonal berries and kiwi.

title: Chocolate Ganache Tart
description: Rich, silky dark chocolate ganache in a crunchy tart shell.

title: Lemon Meringue Tart
description: Tangy lemon curd in a crisp tart shell, topped with a lofty Italian meringue.

title: Salted Caramel Pecan Tart
description: Buttery tart filled with salted caramel and toasted pecans.

title: Matcha Yuzu Tart
description: Japanese-inspired tart with earthy matcha green tea base and bright yuzu citrus filling.
